_comment: Virtual collection parameter configuration. Each key is a parameter-name exposed by this API.
_comment_custom_dimensions: The optional 'custom_dimensions' object on any parameter is forwarded verbatim as extra
query parameters on every upstream request for that parameter. Available dimensions:
standard_name  - CF standard name (https://vocab.nerc.ac.uk/standard_name/); also used
to remap the upstream response key to this parameter's virtual name
level          - Height of measurement above ground level in meters (e.g. "2", "10")
Parameters that share an upstream collection but differ in custom_dimensions are sent
as separate upstream requests and merged before returning to the client.

air_temperature_2m.title: Air Temperature
air_temperature_2m.description: Air temperature measured at 2 m above ground

relative_humidity_surface.title: Relative Humidity
relative_humidity_surface.description: Relative humidity of the air at 2 m above ground

wind_speed_10m.title: Wind Speed
wind_speed_10m.description: Wind speed at 10 m above ground

wind_direction_10m.title: Wind Direction
wind_direction_10m.description: Wind direction at 10 m above ground (degrees from north)

precipitation_amount_1h.title: Precipitation Amount
precipitation_amount_1h.description: Total precipitation amount over the observation period
